allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\(''Import OK''\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat/sync -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"": ""Hello! Say hi in one sentence.""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat/sync -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""Hello! Say hi in one sentence.""}")
Bash(python -c "from app.config import ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; print\(f''Key starts with: {ANTHROPIC_API_KEY[:20]}...'' if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY else ''EMPTY''\)")
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""Say hello in Korean, one sentence.""}")
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""Tell me a short joke about programming.""}")
